title: Feature request: optimize pass for gt cells with constant output

features.name: gt_comparison_with_constant_result
features.description: Code should include a greater-than comparison between concatenation operands where the result is always a constant (0 or 1) regardless of variable values

features.name: gt_comparison_simplifies_to_signal
features.description: Code should include a greater-than comparison between concatenation operands where the result simplifies to a single signal expression

features.name: gt_comparison_with_not_operation
features.description: Code should include a greater-than comparison where the result simplifies to a logical NOT of a signal

features.name: concatenation_replication_in_comparison
features.description: Code should include concatenation with replication pattern where a single bit is repeated multiple times to form comparison operands
